action.reasoning: Observation: The previous evaluation yielded a new best IC of 0.054254 with an ensemble of 15 LightGBM models. Analysis: The ensemble approach continues to scale well. To push the performance further, I will increase the ensemble size to 20 models. I will also lower the learning rate to 0.01 for even more gradual learning, increase early_stopping_rounds to 300, and set `colsample_bytree=0.6` and `subsample=0.6` to further increase the diversity among the individual models in the ensemble. Decision: Update train.py with these new hyperparameters, update predict.py to load up to 30 models, run training and local test, and submit for evaluation.

    --relative[=<prefix>]
